<!-- Brief description of the skill's purpose and when it triggers -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` has valid YAML frontmatter (`name`, `description`)
- [ ] Skill is under 500 lines
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, tokens, or secrets
- [ ] No instructions to disable safety checks or bypass permissions
- [ ] No external network calls unless clearly documented
- [ ] README.md skills table updated
- [ ] Tested locally with Claude Code
